rationale: In the citing paper, Miklos-Thal and Zhang (2013) appears only once, in the concluding section as an example for a possible future research idea about attribution of market performance to product quality. The citation is not used to build the paper's core theory, hypotheses, experimental design, identification strategy, or main interpretation of findings. It functions as a brief background pointer in a speculative discussion rather than a meaningful input to the executed study.
